name: Citrus Cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak gelatin in grapefruit juice to soften.
2. Add boiling orange juice and orange extract to the softened gelatin mixture. Stir until sugar is completely dissolved.
3. Pour the mixture into an 8-inch square pan and chill until partially set.
4. Sprinkle walnuts on top if desired.
1 serving without nuts contains 24 Calories - 1/2 fruit & vegetable choice.
1 serving with nuts contains 33 Calories - 1/2 fruit & vegetable choice, 1/2 fats & oils choice.
16 pieces (2"x2")
